rules.rule_text:
rule bookworm_dll_by_name : malware
{
	meta:
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker _AT h3x.eu>"
		description = "Match ushata by the name"

	strings:
		$dll01 = "ushata.dll"
		$dll02 = "XecureIO_v20.dll"

	condition:
		any of them and filesize < 10000
}

rule_metadata.name: bookworm_payload_by_modules_names
rule_metadata.description: Detect ushata payload by usage of more than 2 modules
rule_metadata.author: @h3x2b <tracker _AT h3x.eu>

rules.rule_text:
rule bookworm_payload_by_modules_names : malware
{
	meta:
		description = "Detect ushata payload by usage of more than 2 modules"
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker _AT h3x.eu>"

	strings:
		$mod_01 = "Leader.dll"
		$mod_02 = "Coder.dll"
		$mod_03 = "Digest.dll"
		$mod_04 = "AES.dll"
		$mod_05 = "KBLogger.dll"
		$mod_06 = "Network.dll"
		$mod_07 = "Resolver.dll"
		$mod_08 = "HTTP.dll"
		$mod_09 = "WinINetwork.dll"
		$mod_10 = "ushata.dll"
		$mod_11 = "ProgramStartup"

	condition:
		3 of them
}

rule_metadata.name: bookworm_payload_match
rule_metadata.description: Detect bookworm payload by encrypted header
rule_metadata.author: @h3x2b <tracker _AT h3x.eu>
